headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Vulcan Materials, Raises Price Target to $298

headline: Vulcan Materials Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
summary: Vulcan Materials (VMC) reported 9% growth in Adjusted EBITDA and beat analyst estimates for earnings and sales. Analysts maintain Overweight rating and raise price target.
